summary: Iteration 2 full E2E happy path PASSED. Backend pytest regression 8/8 green. Frontend: sign-in with seeded creator@rocketsense.test landed on /dashboard, dashboard-stats + tabs + create button rendered, QuizBuilder accepted YouTube URL + title, builder-pin-question-button created and auto-opened question editor, question-type-select-0 contained all 5 types (single-select, multi-select, rank options, confidence rating, short explanation), options + correct + explanation saved, redirect to /dashboard succeeded. tab-mine showed the new quiz, play-quiz-<id> opened QuizPlayer, question-overlay auto-appeared at timestamp 0 with prompt 'Best play?' and both options, overlay submit closed it, quiz-submit-button took us to /quizzes/<id>/results/<attemptId>, results-score-card showed 100% (1/1 CORRECT), result-question-0 contained the explanation 'Rotation is key', results-dashboard-button returned to /dashboard, nav-signout-button cleared the session (redirected to /auth as expected for unauthenticated state).

issues: The 'RULE #xx / BOOTING REPLAY VAULT' splash screen blocks dashboard render for ~2-3s on each navigation to /dashboard. Tests must wait_for [data-testid=dashboard-stats] explicitly, otherwise interactions race against the splash. Consider keeping splash but rendering it as a non-blocking overlay so the dashboard mounts in parallel.

critical_code_review_comments: AuthPage error fallback hardening works: invalid_credentials path now surfaces a usable message (no more 'body stream already read'). Verified indirectly because sign-in succeeded and rendering didn't throw.
QuizBuilder pin button auto-opens the new question (setEditingIdx(questions.length)). Worth noting in playbook so future tests don't double-toggle and accidentally collapse it.
Rule loading splash gates the dashboard; consider non-blocking overlay or shorter timer to improve perceived perf.
grade_answer for type=short auto-scores correct on non-empty text — intentional ('reflective') but should be documented in PRD.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (full happy path: signin -> dashboard -> build -> save -> play -> overlay -> submit -> results 100% -> dashboard -> signout)

test_credentials: creator@rocketsense.test / RocketTest123! — confirmed seeded and working
seed_data_creation: Created 1 quiz 'RL Decision Test' (id 3b480bdd-1118-4a67-ab2d-516693758ad7) under creator account during E2E run. One attempt also recorded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All happy-path flows verified. Backend regression at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py. To test rapidly, sign in with seeded creator account and always wait_for [data-testid=dashboard-stats] visible AFTER /dashboard URL match (splash screen blocks initial render ~2-3s). Pin button auto-opens new question editor — do NOT click question-toggle-0 right after pin or you'll collapse it.
rca of the issue: No outstanding bugs. Prior iteration's AuthPage 'body stream already read' is no longer reproducible — seeded confirmed users + hardened error rendering fixed it.
